title: White coat hypertension documentation
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Supports clinic, home, or ambulatory blood-pressure monitoring, symptoms, medication and lifestyle discussion, and an annual review without generating targets, treatment, or advice.

source.title: Hypertension in adults: diagnosis and management
source.population: Adults undergoing blood-pressure measurement, hypertension assessment, or monitoring, including adults with type 2 diabetes where specified.
source.setting: Primary care, outpatient review, home or ambulatory monitoring, and specialist referral pathways.
source.exclusions: Exact for blood-pressure device technique, clinic measurement, ABPM and HBPM result review, cardiovascular-risk context, monitoring, annual review, and documented high-risk features. Diagnostic conclusions, targets, treatment, medicines, and referrals are not generated or mapped. The postural-hypotension section additionally supports clinician-entered orthostatic blood-pressure documentation without automatic diagnosis or management.
